name: sdlc-skills
description: Model-invoked skills for SDLC framework orchestration

skills.name: artifact-orchestration
skills.description: Multi-agent artifact generation with Primary Author → Reviewers → Synthesizer pattern

skills.name: gate-evaluation
skills.description: Phase gate validation with multi-agent review (LOM, ABM, IOC, PRM)

skills.name: security-assessment
skills.description: STRIDE threat modeling, OWASP checks, and security control validation

skills.name: traceability-check
skills.description: Bidirectional traceability verification (requirements ↔ code ↔ tests)

skills.name: decision-support
skills.description: Data-driven decisions with weighted matrices and ADR generation

skills.name: incident-triage
skills.description: Rapid incident classification, severity assessment, and response coordination

skills.name: test-coverage
skills.description: Coverage analysis, gap identification, and test recommendations

skills.name: architecture-evolution
skills.description: Architecture change management with impact analysis and migration planning

skills.name: risk-cycle
skills.description: Continuous risk management throughout SDLC phases

skills.name: sdlc-reports
skills.description: Iteration, phase, and executive reporting with metrics dashboards

skills.name: issue-auto-sync
skills.description: Automatic issue tracking synchronization from commits and artifacts

skills.name: tot-exploration
skills.description: Tree-of-Thought exploration for architecture decisions with branching evaluation

skills.name: citation-guard
skills.description: Real-time citation verification and hallucination prevention during content generation

skills.name: grade-on-ingest
skills.description: Auto-trigger GRADE quality assessment when new research sources are added to corpus

skills.name: auto-provenance
skills.description: Automatically generate W3C PROV-compliant provenance records when agents create or modify artifacts

skills.name: regression-learning
skills.description: Cross-task learning for improving regression detection through pattern recognition, test prioritization, and historical analysis

skills.name: doc-sync
skills.description: Synchronize documentation and code to eliminate drift through parallel audit and automated fixes

skills.name: doc-consolidate
skills.description: Crawl repository for scattered docs and consolidate into categorized reference index in .aiwg/docs/

skills.name: sdlc-accelerate
skills.description: End-to-end SDLC ramp-up from idea to construction-ready with automated phase transitions and focused gate questions

skills.name: artifact-lookup
skills.description: Search and navigate SDLC artifacts using the artifact index via aiwg index CLI

skills.name: cleanup-audit
skills.description: Dead code analysis and cleanup recommendations for unused exports, orphaned files, and stale dependencies

skills.name: code-chunker
skills.description: Analyze source file structure and produce a navigable map with logical sections, line ranges, and summaries
triggers: show me the structure of this file

skills.name: decompose-file
skills.description: Analyze a large source file and produce a concrete decomposition plan with optional execution
triggers: split this file into smaller modules
this file is too large, break it up

skills.name: issue-driven-al
skills.description: Orchestrates issue-driven agent loops that post cycle status to issue threads and incorporate human feedback

skills.name: regression-api-contract
skills.description: Detect breaking changes in API contracts across REST, GraphQL, and gRPC interfaces

skills.name: regression-auto-baseline
skills.description: Automatically manage regression test baseline lifecycle with triggers for releases, deployments, and quality gates

skills.name: regression-baseline
skills.description: Create and maintain regression test baselines for comparison and drift detection

skills.name: regression-bisect
skills.description: Identify the commit that introduced a regression using git bisect

skills.name: regression-cicd-hooks
skills.description: Integrate regression testing into CI/CD pipelines with automated baseline comparison and merge blocking

skills.name: regression-metrics
skills.description: Track and analyze regression statistics, trends, and health indicators

skills.name: regression-performance
skills.description: Detect performance regressions by comparing benchmarks across versions

skills.name: regression-report
skills.description: Generate comprehensive regression analysis reports combining bisect, baseline, and metrics data

skills.name: regression-visual
skills.description: Detect visual and UI regressions through screenshot comparison and pixel-diff analysis
